tasks.intent:
Set up search filters for private seller boats near Miami with minimum price $35,000.

WHAT TO CLICK:
- Location dropdown (shows 'Location' text with down arrow in left sidebar)
- 'Zip Code' pill button (rounded white button in sidebar)
- Distance dropdown showing '25 miles' (keep default or select 25)
- Price filter dropdown in left sidebar
- Minimum price field or slider
- 'Private Seller' option in seller type filter
- Sort dropdown in top-right showing 'Sort: Recommended'

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Any boat photos (large rectangular images in listing cards)
- Heart/save icons (heart-shaped icons in top-right of photos)
- 'Featured' labels (gray tags on photos)
- Social media icons (circular white icons in footer: YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, Reddit)
- Blue promotional banners ('Calculate your boat loan instantly', 'Pre-qualify for a boat loan')
- Navigation dropdown menus in header

STEPS:
1. Look for zip code input field in left sidebar Location section
2. type_text('33101') in the zip code field
3. Ensure distance is set to 25 miles (click dropdown if needed)
4. Find and click on Price filter dropdown in left sidebar
5. Set minimum price to 35000 (type in field or use slider)
6. Find and click on Seller Type filter in left sidebar
7. Click on 'Private Seller' option (text or checkbox)
8. Click on Sort dropdown in top-right showing 'Sort: Recommended'
9. Click on 'Recently Updated' or 'Newest' option
10. done(success=true, summary='Search filters configured for private sellers near Miami 33101, $35k minimum, sorted by newest')

ERROR HANDLERS:
- If popup appears → look for 'Accept' or 'OK' button, click once
- If page doesn't load → scroll(direction='down', amount=3), wait, try again
- If filter not found → scroll(direction='down', amount=3) in sidebar to reveal more options
- If off-site redirect → key_press(keys='alt+left') immediately

Extract boat listing data from search results, focusing on private seller listings with phone numbers.

WHAT TO CLICK:
- Text area BELOW boat photos showing boat title/price (NOT the photo itself)
- Card border/frame area around each listing (avoid the photo)
- Back button or use Alt+Left to return to results
- 'Next' page button at bottom of results

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Boat photos (large rectangular images) - opens gallery trap showing '1 of N'
- Heart/save icons (heart shapes in top-right of photos)
- 'Featured' labels (gray tags on photos)
- Social media icons in footer (circular white icons on blue background)
- Ad banners or promotional boxes
- Dealer logos or contact dealer buttons
- Navigation menus in header

STEPS FOR EACH LISTING:
1. Look for listing cards (rectangular cards with boat photos)
2. click() on the TEXT AREA below the boat photo (title/price area, NOT the photo)
3. Wait for detail page to load
4. scroll(direction='down', amount=5) to read description
5. Look for phone numbers in format: (555)555-5555, 555-555-5555, or 10+ consecutive digits
6. IGNORE: prices ($35,000), years (2020), zip codes (33101), partial numbers (555)
7. Extract: year, make, model, asking price, boat type, seller phone, seller name
8. Note the URL from address bar
9. key_press(keys='alt+left') to return to results
10. Repeat for next listing on page
11. When page complete, click 'Next' text link at bottom
12. Continue until no 'Next' button found

OUTPUT FORMAT:
For valid listings with phone numbers:
- done(success=true, summary='EXTRACTED | Year: 2020 | Make: Sea Ray | Model: Sundancer | Price: $45000 | Type: Motor Yacht | Phone: (305)555-1234 | Seller: John Smith | URL: [full_url]')

For listings without phone numbers:
- done(success=true, summary='SKIPPED | No phone number found | Year: 2020 | Make: Sea Ray | Model: Sundancer')

ERROR HANDLERS:
- Photo gallery trap (shows '1 of N' overlay) → key_press(keys='Escape'), then key_press(keys='alt+left')
- 404 error → key_press(keys='alt+left'), continue to next listing
- Off-site redirect (URL not boattrader.com) → key_press(keys='alt+left') immediately
- Cookie popup → click 'Accept' button once, max 2 attempts
- Page load timeout → scroll(direction='down', amount=3), wait, try again
- No more results → done(success=true, summary='COMPLETED | All pages processed')

loop.pagination_intent: Click 'Next' text link at bottom of results page to go to next page of listings
